qa_pair.question: Which database serves as the persistent source of truth for the memory server?
What library is used by the memory server for index-based vector similarity searches?
Which embedding model is used by default in the memory server settings?
What is the default vector dimension size configured for the nomic embedding model?
What inner product configuration is used to match cosine similarity in the FAISS index?
If the memory FAISS index is deleted from disk, does it cause data loss or does it rebuild from SQLite?
Is memory_delete idempotent when deleting a non-existent or already deleted record?
Which tool would you call to fetch memories sorted by their similarity score?
Which tool provides paginated access to list all stored memories in the database?
What is the maximum number of tags that can be passed to memory_add?
